name: Drone Inspection Services
description: The most comprehensive directory of FAA Part 107-certified drone inspection pilots, UAV thermography specialists, and aerial survey operators in the United States.
cityPagePromptContext:
Drone inspection services use FAA Part 107-certified pilots operating commercial UAVs to inspect rooftops, cell towers, power lines, bridges, solar arrays, and industrial facilities.
Equipped with RGB, thermal, and multispectral cameras, pilots capture high-resolution imagery and thermal anomaly data without scaffolding or rope access.
General contractors hire them for construction progress documentation and roof assessments; utilities contract them for transmission line and tower surveys; insurers dispatch them after hail storms and hurricanes for rapid loss documentation.
Reports include geotagged photo sets, thermal overlays, and measurement data typically delivered within 24-48 hours.
buyerSearchContext: when assessing storm damage, inspecting infrastructure, documenting construction progress, or filing insurance claims requiring aerial evidence

editorialAuthor.name: Nick Palmer
editorialAuthor.title: Founder & Lead Researcher
editorialAuthor.bio: Nick built this directory to help general contractors and risk managers find FAA Part 107-certified drone inspectors without wading through generalist photography outfits that added a drone as an upsell — a conflict of interest he ran into when trying to document storm damage on a commercial roof and couldn’t tell which operators carried the commercial liability insurance to back their reports.

schema.label: FAA Part 107 Certified
schema.scrape_hint: Look for FAA Part 107 certificate numbers, explicit 'FAA certified' or 'Part 107 licensed' statements on homepage, about page, or footer; also check for TRUST certificates or FAA DroneZone registration mentions.

schema.label: Years of Experience
schema.scrape_hint: Extract from ''About Us'', team bios, or ''10+ years of commercial drone operations'' statements; calculate from founding year if business start date is provided.

schema.label: Inspection Specialties
schema.scrape_hint: Scan services menu, homepage offerings, or industry-specific pages; match keywords like ''roof inspection'', ''cell tower survey'', ''transmission line'', ''bridge inspection'', ''solar panel inspection'', or ''construction monitoring''.

schema.label: Thermal Imaging Capable
schema.scrape_hint: Check for mentions of ''thermal imaging'', ''infrared inspection'', ''FLIR camera'', ''heat mapping'', or ITC/ASNT thermography certification in services or equipment pages.

schema.label: Commercial Liability Insured
schema.scrape_hint: Look for ''$1M liability'', ''commercially insured'', ''hull and liability coverage'', or certificate of insurance mentions on about or FAQ pages; some operators list their insurer by name.

schema.label: Report Turnaround Time
schema.scrape_hint: Extract from service descriptions, FAQs, or ''What to Expect'' sections; look for phrases like ''deliverables within 24 hours'' or ''report ready in 2 business days''.

schema.label: Clients & Industries Served
schema.scrape_hint: Parse ''Industries Served'' or ''Who We Work With'' sections; match keywords like ''insurance adjusters'', ''utilities'', ''general contractors'', ''municipalities'', or ''emergency response''.

schema.label: Phone Number
schema.scrape_hint: Extract from header, footer, contact page, or click-to-call buttons; normalize to standard format (e.g., (555) 123-4567).

schema.label: Website
schema.scrape_hint: Capture primary domain from browser address bar, homepage links, or business listings; ensure full URL with https:// protocol.
